title: Cephalophyllum curtophyllum
taxonomy: Cephalophyllum curtophyllum is classified as a succulent plant. It belongs to the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the vygie family. Within the Aizoaceae family, Cephalophyllum curtophyllum is placed in the genus Cephalophyllum. The genus Cephalophyllum is a group of succulent plants native to South Africa. It is often characterized by its unique leaf structure and colorful blooms.
uses: Cephalophyllum curtophyllum, also known as the short-leaved head succulent or short-head succulent, is a rare and unique plant species native to South Africa.
